# foundry_group_membership (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry GroupMembership.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "foundry_group_membership" "example" {
  group_id = "example-group-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) ID of the Group. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `group_members` (Set of String) List of the IDs of the members (Users or Groups) of this Group.
